title: MAVLink battery status parser bounds
short_description: Parser-bounds case backed by real PX4 source at pinned commits around the BATTERY_STATUS bounds fix.
source_citation: Real PX4 source at the commits behind https://github.com/PX4/PX4-Autopilot/pull/18411 (BATTERY_STATUS out-of-bounds fix).
constraints: Evidence for this case is static-source only: real PX4 source at a pinned commit, no SITL, no fuzzing, no runtime replay.

Use the pinned aliases mavlink-battery-status-bounds-pre and mavlink-battery-status-bounds-post (or a real PX4 commit hash) as target_commit; the legacy pre-patch-demo/post-patch-demo strings are no longer supported for this case.
Treat the verdict as a structural observation about the source at the resolved commit, not a runtime safety judgment.
doc_snippet: A supplier note claims a MAVLink battery/status parser now rejects malformed payload lengths before copying fields into the telemetry state. The public snippet says the fix should preserve normal BATTERY_STATUS handling while refusing frames whose declared extension fields exceed the parser buffer.

title: MAVLink FTP path handling
short_description: A curated file/path-handling case for MAVLink FTP request normalization.
source_citation: Curated demo fixture based on public MAVLink FTP path traversal hardening notes, 2026-05-23.
constraints: Do not access host files outside the run folder.
Prefer the path-handling test card for this case.
doc_snippet: A public changelog entry says FTP requests should normalize requested paths, reject parent-directory traversal, and keep accepted reads inside the configured mission-storage root. The claim is narrow: path validation only, not general file-permission enforcement.

title: Unclear telemetry dropout claim
short_description: A deliberately vague claim that needs cautious review instead of a strong automated conclusion.
source_citation: Curated demo fixture for unclear supplier claims, 2026-05-23.
constraints: Use this case to exercise cautious summaries.
A manual-review result is acceptable and expected.
doc_snippet: A supplier response says telemetry dropouts are improved in the current build, but it does not name the affected message type, trigger condition, or acceptance threshold. The available text is enough to plan a review, not enough to prove a firmware fix.
